thing-type.label: IntesisHome WiFi Adapter
thing-type.description: Represents a single IntesisHome WiFi adapter on the network, connected to an A/C unit.

parameter.name: ipAddress
parameter.label: IP Address
parameter.description: IP Address of the Intesis device.

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Password
parameter.description: Password to log into the IntesisHome device Web-Server.

parameter.name: pollingInterval
parameter.label: Polling Interval
parameter.description: Defines the time in seconds to poll the state of the connected devices. The minimum is 30 seconds.

thing-type.label: IntesisBox Adapter
thing-type.description: Represents a single IntesisBox WiFi adapter on the network, connected to an A/C unit.

parameter.name: ipAddress
parameter.label: IP Address
parameter.description: IP Address of the Intesis device.

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: The TCP port to the IntesisBox.

parameter.name: pollingInterval
parameter.label: Polling Interval
parameter.description: Defines the time in seconds to poll the state of the connected devices. The minimum is 45 seconds.

channel-type.label: Error Status
channel-type.description: Indicates if the Air Conditioner has encountered an error.
